attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a stone pickaxe without first obtaining enough cobblestone. Specifically, you needed 3 cobblestone to craft a stone pickaxe, but you only had 1-2 cobblestone at any given time. To fix this, ensure you gather at least 3 cobblestone before attempting to craft the stone pickaxe. Additionally, after crafting the stone pickaxe, use it to mine more cobblestone efficiently. Correctly order your actions by first gathering cobblestone, then crafting the stone pickaxe, and finally using it to mine more resources.
